productDisplayName: Latin Quarters Women Brown Printed Dress
description: Style Note This brown dress, is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this fabulous dress. Style this with understated accessories and heeled shoes. Product Details Brown floral print dress that has braided straps, round neck, an empire waist, inner lining and a zipped opening on the left side Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
